config.hotkey.name: Summon Horse Key
config.hotkey.tooltip: Press this key to teleport your horse to you. Default: None.
config.debug.name: Debug Mode
config.debug.tooltip: Show current speed stats above player.
config.adaptive.name: Adaptive Mode
config.adaptive.tooltip: If checked, speed changes based on your Energy %.
config.constant.name: Base Horse Speed
config.constant.tooltip: Speed added to horse when Adaptive Mode is OFF.
config.adaptive.note: Set speed bonus for each energy level.
